notes: Coach — a built-in tuning assistant. It opens automatically on the right; describe any problem in plain English ("it shakes late", "lands in water", "Fortune River keeps triggering") and it proposes exact setting changes you apply with one click, analyzes your recent runs, and estimates your ideal cycle time from your stats. Runs fully offline by default, with an optional Claude API mode (bring your own key) for free-form conversation — switch in the Coach ⚙ menu. Also includes a critical recovery fix: a 0 recovery-threshold no longer causes an instant break-out / Fortune River loop.
